name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cups Ala Weight Watch2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heatproof bowl, combine the peanut butter and chocolate. Place the bowl in a medium-sized heatproof bowl and fill it with boiling water. Let stand, stirring frequently until the chocolate is melted and well-combined.
2. Set 8 fluted paper candy liners on a serving platter. Using a teaspoon, spoon 1/8 of the chocolate mixture into each liner. Cover the platter with plastic wrap and refrigerate until the candies are firm.
Makes 4 servings, with 2 candies each. Each serving provides: 1/2 protein, 60 optional calories. Per serving: 84 calories.
